scenario_results.reason: The lane resolved a standard unapplied-funds servicing question only when the servicing, escrow, and payment records aligned and the borrower communication stayed inside documented status language.
Missing loan and payment prerequisites produced a blocked-state response instead of speculative servicing.
Unsupported delinquency and fee overrides were treated as approval-bound exceptions and routed rather than executed in-lane.
A servicing conversation that turned into suspicious payoff-wire handling was handed to fraud or AML ownership without disclosing SAR posture.
Repeat failure signals in loss-mitigation support triggered an owner-routed escalation package instead of another unsupported servicing promise.
Identity-theft and payment-change indicators caused immediate fraud or AML routing and blocked unsupported accommodations.
Conflicting loan-current, statement-delinquency, and foreclosure-referral records were surfaced as a disclosure and reconciliation conflict rather than over-resolved.
The lane preserved loan-servicing terminology such as P&I, escrow shortage, suspense, BRP, and payoff quote instead of collapsing into generic support wording.
Legal-interpretation, modification-approval, and credit-reporting requests were rejected cleanly and routed to the correct owners.
Missing investor context and conflicting transfer records triggered low-confidence escalation instead of confident synthesis.
Public-source and tenant-policy conflict was recorded as a precedence issue requiring escalation.
Tenant-specific military and approval gates were applied as stricter overlays without implying discretionary servicing authority.

notes: All 12 defined scenarios are represented in functionality_map.json scenario_coverage.
All required abilities across shared, service-support-and-resolution, and financial-services-and-insurance layers are mapped and validated.
All 12 scenarios passed against the standard 0.92 threshold with complete ability coverage for the service-support-and-resolution and financial-services-and-insurance contract.
The package stays inside loan-servicing support and does not claim legal, underwriting, fraud-adjudication, AML-investigation, modification-approval, foreclosure, or bankruptcy authority.
